assertionResults.title: /mission-status command displays current mission state
contractExpectations: Display an appropriate message when no active mission exists

steps.action: Link extension from /Users/codex/Projects/gemini-mission-control-extension using gemini extensions link
steps.expected: Extension installs successfully and is usable from project root
steps.observed: gemini reported 'Installing extension "gemini-mission-control"' and exited 0 after the confirmation prompt line

steps.action: Run explicit-ID status command: gemini -p "/mission-status mis_ddaac4" --approval-mode=yolo -e gemini-mission-control
steps.expected: Output includes mission ID, current state, completed/total features, current milestone, and working directory
steps.observed: Output included mission ID mis_ddaac4, state planning, working directory, progress 0 / 0, sealed milestones, and last updated time, but did not include a current milestone field. The response also mentioned a nonexistent ~/gemini-mission-control/src/cli.ts path and fell back to direct state-file reading.

steps.action: Run no-arg status command: gemini -p "/mission-status" --approval-mode=yolo -e gemini-mission-control
steps.expected: Output should report current mission state or an appropriate no-active-mission message
steps.observed: Output reported the latest mission (mis_ddaac4) with state, progress, working directory, and last updated time, but still omitted current milestone. It did not exercise a no-active-mission message because existing missions were present, and the command behavior selected the latest mission instead.

steps.expected: Artifact state should confirm whether missing fields exist in persisted mission data
steps.observed: state.json contains missionId, state, workingDirectory, completedFeatures, totalFeatures, createdAt, updatedAt, sealedMilestones, and milestonesWithValidationPlanned; features.json contains an empty features array. No current milestone value exists to render.

commandOutputs.summary: Loaded cached credentials. Installing extension "gemini-mission-control". Prompted to continue and exited 0.

Final response showed Mission ID mis_ddaac4, State planning, Working Directory /Users/codex/Projects/gemini-mission-control-extension, Progress 0 / 0 features completed, Sealed Milestones None, and Last Updated 2026-03-12T21:55:53Z; no current milestone field was shown.

Final response showed Mission ID mis_ddaac4, State planning, Progress 0/0 features completed, Working Directory /Users/codex/Projects/gemini-mission-control-extension, and Last Updated 2026-03-12T21:55:53Z; no current milestone field was shown.

filesInspected.finding: Prompt format only requires Mission ID, State, Progress, Working Directory, and Last Updated; it does not instruct the model to display current milestone or a no-active-mission concept.
Mission state is readable and matches the displayed mission ID/state/progress/working directory values, but has no dedicated current milestone field.
features array is empty, reinforcing that no current milestone can be derived from the mission artifacts.

issues: The explicit-ID and no-arg CLI outputs omit the contract-required current milestone field.
mission-status.toml encodes a format without current milestone, so the omission is systematic rather than incidental.
A no-active-mission path could not be exercised non-destructively because existing missions were present and the no-arg command is designed to select the latest mission instead.

frictions.description: Headless gemini runs emitted unrelated MCP discovery errors and skill-conflict warnings before the actual command response.
frictions.resolution: Ignored the noise and evaluated the final mission-status output plus mission files on disk.

frictions.description: The explicit-ID mission-status run mentioned a nonexistent ~/gemini-mission-control/src/cli.ts path before falling back to direct state-file reading.
frictions.resolution: Used the final CLI response and direct inspection of state.json/features.json to determine whether the contract was met.

summary: VAL-FOUND-009 failed on re-test. Strongest evidence: both real Gemini CLI mission-status invocations omitted the contract-required current milestone field, and commands/mission-status.toml itself only specifies Mission ID, State, Progress, Working Directory, and Last Updated.
